---
title: "Simulation Report"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: 
  github_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(igraph)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(ggraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Simulation Run
